ground_truth.title: State of Gen Z Mental Health 2025 - Harmony Healthcare IT
ground_truth.author: Casey Colvin
ground_truth.main_content: Survey: 46% of Gen Z has a mental health diagnosis—yet optimism is rising. See how they're coping, reshaping work, and redefining success.
with: Survey: 46% of Gen Z has a mental health diagnosis—yet optimism is rising.
See how they're coping, reshaping work, and redefining success.
The report reveals key findings about Gen Z's mental health landscape in 2025.
Data highlights trends in workplace mental health and coping strategies.
This survey provides insights into how Gen Z is navigating mental health challenges.
